body_preview: - Graph pressure #5: search_error_count=1 — search/grep errors created avoidable evolution friction. - `ProjectSearchTool::execute` at line 202-220 calls `build_project_rg_args` or `build_project_grep_args`, which append `pattern` and `path` as final arguments (lines 337-338, 377-378). Neither function inserts a `--` separator before user-supplied arguments.
expected_evidence: search_error_count in future sessions drops to 0 or stays at 1 (no new entries). Tool-failure reconciliation shows no search-pattern-escaping failures in new sessions. Dashboard tool-name breakdown for search shows zero exit-code-2 errors from flag misinterpretation.
title: Harden search tool pattern with -- separator and extended regex error detection
